note: wave1-pilot actual per-connector executor costs (Sonnet 5 subagent usage; tokens = total subagent tokens incl. reads). Recorded by the coordinator from harness usage stats, 2026-07-02.

summary.wall_clock_wave: ~45 min for the 10-way parallel fan-out (long pole github 43 min)

pass_a_projection.note: Solo-agent pilot cost is the UPPER bound; fan-out bundles S=12/M=7/L=4/XL=1 amortize context loading. Naive per-connector extrapolation: 544 x ~270k = ~147M subagent tokens; bundled estimate with shared-context amortization (~40-50% savings observed wave0): ~75-90M. Wave0 orchestration-plan estimate of 30M for Pass A was optimistic; revise to 75-90M.

pass_b_consideration: Pilot migrated at PARITY only. Full-surface expansion (Pass B) per-connector cost unmeasured in this wave; the api_surface research+implement flow adds doc-fetching. Recommend measuring on 3-5 connectors early in wave5 before committing the full ~350-agent roster.
